title: Oupa Jonkies turns 100
description: SEDGEFIELD NEWS - The family of John...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"SEDGEFIELD NEWS - The family of John Johannes 'Jonkies' Oelf travelled from far and wide to attend his 100th birthday in Karatara on 17 June.","html":"SEDGEFIELD NEWS - The family of John Johannes 'Jonkies' Oelf travelled from far and wide to attend his 100th birthday in Karatara on 17 June."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"More than 200 family and friends attended the function in the Karatara Community Hall to celebrate Oupa 'The King''s century."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Local councillor Cleone Vanston donated R3 000 from the Ward 2 budget towards his celebration.","html":"Local councillor Cleone Vanston donated R3 000 from the Ward 2 budget towards his celebration."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Oupa John was born on 11 June 1925 at Highway Portland near Rheenendal. His parents were Johanna Self and Kerneels Prins."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They had eight children, three daughters and five sons. John grew up in Barrington and later met and married Bertha Merton from Belvidere. They have eight children, six daughters - Gwen, Johenna, Vera, Joa, Caroline and Pearl - and two sons - John and David, who has passed away.","html":"They had eight children, three daughters and five sons. John grew up in Barrington and later met and married Bertha Merton from Belvidere. They have eight children, six daughters - Gwen, Johenna, Vera, Joa, Caroline and Pearl - and two sons - John and David, who has passed away."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Active life","html":"Active life"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"John, who is fondly known as 'Oom Jonkie', which evolved into 'Oupa Jonkie' as he got older, worked in forestry and retired from Farleigh Forest Station at age 60.","html":"John, who is fondly known as 'Oom Jonkie', which evolved into 'Oupa Jonkie' as he got older, worked in forestry and retired from Farleigh Forest Station at age 60."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The family moved around before settling in Karatara. His wife has passed away, and his daughters have lovingly cared for him."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Oupa Jonkie has led an active life and could often be seen riding around Karatara on his bicycle. He is also fond of gardening.","html":"Oupa Jonkie has led an active life and could often be seen riding around Karatara on his bicycle. He is also fond of gardening."},{"type":"paragraph","text":""We are privileged to have celebrated his 100th birthday," said his great-granddaughter, Lizani Donne Zani Folding.","html":""We are privileged to have celebrated his 100th birthday," said his great-granddaughter, Lizani Donne Zani Folding."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
